channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Concerns Raised Over Proposed NDIS Amendments and Their Impact
item.description: On 14 May 2026, Health Minister Mark Butler introduced the National Disability Insurance Scheme Amendment (Securing the NDIS for Future Generations) Bill to federal parliament, framing it as a necessa...

item.title: Husband Pleads with Kidnappers to Take Him Instead of His Wife and 18-Month-Old Baby in Oyo School Attack
item.description: One teacher wey dem kidnap for Oriire Local Government Area for Oyo State, her husband don come out openly to beg the gunmen wey carry her and their small pikin. The man talk say him ready to surrende...

item.title: GVMC plans to conduct 100 dog sterilisation surgeries daily to manage stray population
item.description: The Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation (GVMC) has announced plans to significantly increase its dog sterilisation operations, targeting 100 surgeries per day to better manage the stray dog po...

item.title: Sanwo-Olu Commends Voter Turnout as Lagos APC Primary Proceeds Smoothly
item.description: Lagos State Governor, Babajide Sanwo-Olu, don commend di voters wey come out in large numbers to support Deputy Governor Obafemi Hamzat, di consensus candidate of di All Progressives Congress (APC) fo...

item.title: RCMP Union Questions Approval of CBC Prank Targeting Retired Officers
item.description: The president of the National Police Federation, Brian Sauve, is calling for answers after a CBC-linked production involved a prank targeting retired RCMP members. The production, initially presented ...

item.title: Finding Comfort and Connection While Sorting My Mother’s Wardrobe
item.description: After the passing of her mother, Catharine Fitton faced the daunting task of clearing out decades of carefully curated clothing, shoes, accessories, and jewellery. Her mother, Meg, a former art teache...

item.title: Visayas power grid faces repeated yellow alerts amid tight supply
item.description: The Visayas region is experiencing continued challenges with its electricity supply as tight power availability and high system demand prompted another yellow alert, which lasted from 4 p.m. to 9 p.m....

item.title: Michael Cohen Applies for Compensation from Trump's Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: Michael Cohen, former personal attorney to President Donald Trump and now one of his most vocal critics, is seeking compensation from the newly established $1.776 billion 'Anti-Weaponization' fund cre...

item.title: Philippine Navy releases 57 sea turtle hatchlings to West Philippine Sea for conservation
item.description: On May 18, 2026, personnel of the Joint Task Unit Pag-asa (JTUP) under the Western Naval Command (WesNavCom) stationed at Pag-asa Island released 57 sea turtle hatchlings into the West Philippine Sea....

item.title: Iranian man sentenced to 30 years in Tanzania for trafficking heroin and meth in Kilwa waters
item.description: The High Court of Tanzania in Mtwara has sentenced Mr Jan Mohamed Miran, a 51-year-old Iranian national, to 30 years in prison for trafficking large amounts of narcotics in the Indian Ocean. Court doc...

item.title: EHRC issues guidance on use of toilets and changing rooms based on biological sex
item.description: The Equalities and Human Rights Commission (EHRC) has issued new guidance stating that single-sex spaces, such as toilets and changing rooms, should be used according to biological sex. This follows a...

item.title: Pauline Hanson’s Charter Flights Spark Questions Over Taxpayer Costs
item.description: Recent reports have raised concerns over One Nation leader Pauline Hanson's travel expenses. Last week, Guardian Australia revealed that Hanson billed taxpayers nearly $16,000 for private charter flig...

item.title: Residents demand permanent measures to tackle water hyacinth and mosquito menace in Adyar River
item.description: The persistent problem of water hyacinth in the Adyar River has escalated over the past few months, causing serious concerns among local residents and rowers. The dense growth of the weed has not only...

item.title: New York Mayor Ensures Affordable World Cup Tickets for Local Residents
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, in collaboration with the NYNJ Host Committee, has secured 1,000 tickets to the 2026 FIFA World Cup for New York residents at the affordable price of $50 each. Thes...

item.title: NOAA Forecasts Below-Average 2026 Atlantic Hurricane Season Driven by Emerging El Niño
item.description: The 2026 Atlantic hurricane season is expected to be less active than usual, according to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA). The agency predicts between eight to 14 named trop...

item.title: Oprah Winfrey's 1971 Miss Fire Prevention Win in Nashville Launched Her Broadcasting Career
item.description: In 1971, a 17-year-old Oprah Winfrey won the Miss Fire Prevention contest in Nashville, Tennessee. As the only Black participant, she stood out not through traditional beauty standards but through her...

item.title: Tanzania pushes for UN Security Council reforms to include Africa and developing nations
item.description: Tanzania is strongly pushing for reforms at the United Nations Security Council because the current system no longer mirrors the political and demographic realities of today. During the Foreign Minist...

item.title: Philippine workers rank second in workplace happiness in Asia-Pacific
item.description: A recent study by Jobstreet by SEEK, called the Workplace Happiness Index: Philippines 2025, has shown that Filipino employees are among the happiest workers in the Asia-Pacific region, ranking second...

item.title: Sher Afzal Marwat petitions FCC to reinstate Ali Amin Gandapur as KP Chief Minister
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Sher Afzal Khan Marwat, MNA and former PTI member, has approached the Federal Constitutional Court seeking reinstatement of Ali Amin Gandapur as Chief Minister of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. Marwat...

item.title: Highlights of Vivid Sydney 2026 Light Festival
item.description: Vivid Sydney 2026 is transforming the city into a spectacular playground of light, art, and culture. The festival features an impressive 6.5-kilometre light walk stretching from Barangaroo to Darling ...
